zh.Woodcroft, Gloucestershire, England: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾
zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Blakheved是Christopher de Blakheved的兒子，於1300年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾。他於大約1326年與Mrs Richard de Blakheved在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1349年在他的家鄉享年49歲。

zh-hans.Woodcroft, Gloucestershire, England: 英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Blakheved是Christopher de Blakheved的儿子，于1300年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾。他于大约1326年与Mrs Richard de Blakheved在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1349年在他的家乡享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Blakheved was born in 1300, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Christopher de Blakheved. He married Mrs Richard de Blakheved about 1326, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1349, in his hometown, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Blakheved est né en 1300, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Christopher de Blakheved. Il a épousé Mrs Richard de Blakheved environ 1326, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1349, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Blakheved wurde 1300 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Christopher de Blakheved geboren. Er hat um 1326 in England Mrs Richard de Blakheved geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1349 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Blakheved è nato il nel 1300 nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Christopher de Blakheved. Lui sposato Mrs Richard de Blakheved circa 1326, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1349, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.Woodcroft, Gloucestershire, England: イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Blakhevedは1300年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでChristopher de Blakhevedの息子として生まれた。約1326年にイギリスでMrs Richard de Blakhevedと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1349年に故郷で49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Blakheved(은)는 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 Christopher de Blakheved의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1326년 영국에서 Mrs Richard de Blakheved(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1349년 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Blakheved nasceu em 1300, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Christopher de Blakheved. Ele casou-se com Mrs Richard de Blakheved aproximadamente 1326, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1349, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Blakheved родился в 1300 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Christopher de Blakheved. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Richard de Blakheved около 1326 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1349 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Blakheved nació en 1300, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Christopher de Blakheved. Se casó con Mrs Richard de Blakheved aproximadamente 1326, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1349, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años.
